svg.font-family: 'PingFang SC','Hiragino Sans GB','Microsoft YaHei','Noto Sans CJK SC','Source Han Sans SC','Segoe UI',sans-serif
svg.title: translip system architecture
svg.desc: A control plane (FastAPI + React) drives a cache-aware dubbing pipeline: input → separation → transcription → speaker assets → translation → synthesis → render → delivery, with optional OCR / visual-perception templates and output deliverables.
svg.text: CACHE-AWARE DAG · EACH STAGE = ISOLATED SUBPROCESS
